message:
feat(tests): add comprehensive property tests for region tree [bd-s4hw]

Add 4 additional property tests as specified in asupersync-s4hw:

1. deep_nesting_maintains_invariants - Creates deep region chains (up to
   50 levels), verifies invariants at each level, tests cancel propagation
   from root down the entire chain.

2. wide_tree_maintains_invariants - Creates many children (up to 100) at
   root level, verifies invariants scale with breadth.

3. cancellation_propagates_to_children - Builds random trees, cancels a
   random region, verifies cancel propagation invariant holds.

4. full_lifecycle_preserves_invariants - Two-phase test: build up with
   random operations, then tear down, checking invariants throughout.

Total property tests: 6 (including existing random_ops_no_panic and
invariants_maintained_under_stress). All 17 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
